name: QENEX Communications, Inc.
summary: QENEX Communications, Inc. develops various products for the communications and energy industry. Its products include Sapphire, an ISP and enterprise class networking appliance; Ruby, a wireless Ethernet indoor/outdoor subscriber adapter; Onyx, a wireless USB indoor/outdoor subscriber adapter; GeminiVT, a virtual twin wireless technology; Plug-Inet √Ç¬ñ in-building wireless distribution aid; PowerPort, a managed alternative power systems; and Regena, a productive over speed control for wind systems. The company also offers SunSpot, a multi-panel solar output booster; Micro, an anti-tamper embedded computer solution; Nano, a compact and efficient embedded computer; Picolo, a virtual computing solution; LookOut, a wireless neighborhood watch solution; and Realis, a Wireless Community Resource Management Solution. It also focuses on producing, licensing, acquiring, and distributing brand sponsored short-form films for cell phone audiences. The company is based in Corning, Arkansas.
